meta.title: Synergy synthetic values tables (ESTIMATES)
meta.warning: Every figure in this file is a SYNTHETIC ESTIMATE, not observed operator data. Any synergy answer that consumes a value from here MUST be flagged 'derived_from_synthetic': true. Replace with audited data (see Top-Down Data Request) before use in decisions.
meta.currency: IDR bn (billion Indonesian Rupiah) unless stated
meta.illustrative_source: Synergy_Model sheet of Network_Synergy_Table_Better_Version (1).xlsx (values were placeholders in the workbook)

table_1_certainty_weights.description: Weighting scheme for the certainty score (must sum to 1.0).

table_2_unit_economics.description: Per-driver unit values and duplication/applicability ratios used to scale twin volumes into money. driver_source='twin' means the volume is pulled live from the digital twin; the unit_value_idr_bn and applicability_ratio are always synthetic estimates.

pon_duplicate_build.unit_desc: net avoided build per overlapping home passed (~IDR 0.9m)
pon_duplicate_build.rationale: Assumes 30% of ICONNET HP overlap a Telkom planned/committed build; net-of-migration avoided capex.

pon_route_maintenance.unit_desc: annual maintenance saved per removable route-km (~IDR 0.6m/km/yr)
pon_route_maintenance.rationale: Route-km real only where twin has cable geometry (Malang); national route-km estimated from FAT count x 0.35 km/FAT.

olt_retire_redundant.unit_desc: opex + avoided refresh per retired OLT
olt_retire_redundant.rationale: Assumes ~12% of ICONNET OLTs can rehome onto Telkom OLT/PoP with spare capacity.

olt_reuse_xgspon.unit_desc: avoided new-purchase value per reusable OLT/card set
olt_reuse_xgspon.rationale: Only compatible XGS-PON gear; conservative reuse rate.

olt_totex_refresh.unit_desc: NPV of avoided lifecycle refresh per redundant OLT
olt_totex_refresh.rationale: Refresh must be in approved baseline to count.

agg_l2_retire.unit_desc: opex + avoided upgrade per retired aggregation switch
agg_l2_retire.rationale: Switch count not in twin; estimated as OLTs / 8 uplink-groups.

transport_cancel_links.unit_desc: annual recurring cost per cancellable circuit/wavelength
transport_cancel_links.rationale: Circuit inventory not in twin; estimated as OLTs x 1.5 circuits.

pe_retire.unit_desc: opex + avoided upgrade per retired PE router
pe_retire.rationale: PE estate not in twin; estimated at 1 PE per SBU x 4 metro.

bng_retire.unit_desc: license+opex saved per consolidated subscriber session (~IDR 20k/sub)
bng_retire.rationale: Subs proxied by twin homes-served; only a share are license-avoidable.

msan_retire.unit_desc: opex + avoided refresh per retired MSAN site
msan_retire.rationale: Legacy MSAN not in twin; estimated at 0.4 sites per OLT area.

noc_oss.rationale: Programme-level fixed estimate; no direct twin driver.

teams_field.unit_desc: loaded cost saved per reducible field FTE/contractor
teams_field.rationale: FTE not in twin; estimated at 0.5 FTE per OLT.

process_performance.unit_desc: cost/fault + SLA/churn value per avoided fault (~IDR 15k)

procurement.unit_desc: achievable discount fraction applied to addressable spend (value = spend x ratio)
procurement.rationale: Addressable spend estimated from asset base; 8% blended discount.

table_3_synthetic_volumes.description: Volume estimators for levers whose driver is NOT present in the twin. Each is expressed as a formula on twin-observable counts (OLTs, areas) so it scales with region, but the coefficients are synthetic.

agg_switches.note: one aggregation switch per ~8 OLT uplink group

pe_routers.note: ~4 PE routers per SBU metro core

msan_sites.note: ~0.4 legacy MSAN sites per footprint area

fault_events.note: ~3 reportable faults per OLT per year

addressable_spend.note: ~IDR 0.9 bn/yr addressable vendor+support spend per OLT (value already in IDR bn)

route_km_national.note: ~0.35 route-km per FAT serving area (national proxy where twin lacks cable geometry)

table_4_illustrative_model.description: The workbook's own placeholder Synergy_Model figures, kept for reference and used for the certainty component scores. gross/cost_to_achieve are illustrative IDR bn.
